stay.Title: Accommodation in Mauritius
stay.Description: Whether you're dreaming of a 5-star resort on the beach or a cozy mountain retreat, we help you find the perfect home away from home.

WhyBook.Title: Why Book With Us?
WhyBook.Reason1Desc: Every property is personally inspected to ensure high standards of comfort and cleanliness.
WhyBook.Reason2Desc: Our local team is on hand 24/7 to assist with anything you need during your stay.

rental.Title: Car Rental in Mauritius
rental.Description: Discover the freedom of exploring Mauritius on your own terms. We offer a fleet of modern, reliable vehicles to suit every traveler's needs.

economy.Title: Small 5-Seater – Economy Class
economy.Description: Perfect for couples or small families, our Economy 5-Seater option is ideal for getting around Mauritius comfortably and affordably. Compact in size, this vehicle is easy to drive, park, and maneuver on both coastal roads and town streets.
economy.Details: Despite its small footprint, it offers practical interior space, air conditioning, and good fuel efficiency — making it a great choice for short stays, city visits, beach hopping, and everyday island exploring.
economy.BestFor: Couples, solo travelers, short trips, budget-friendly travel.

compact.Title: Small / Medium 5-Seater – Compact Comfort
compact.Description: A step up in comfort and space, the Compact 5-Seater is a popular all-round choice. It combines smooth handling, modern features, and a comfortable interior — ideal for guests who want a bit more room without driving a large vehicle.
compact.Details: Great for exploring the island’s coastal roads, scenic routes, shopping areas, and day trips, this car offers a balance of economy and comfort.
compact.BestFor: Couples, small families, guests wanting comfort with easy driving.

medium.Title: Medium 5-Seater – Comfort Class
medium.Description: Our Medium 5-Seater offers extra space, a higher driving position, and enhanced comfort for longer journeys. With a more spacious cabin and luggage capacity, it’s perfect for guests planning multiple excursions around the island.
medium.Details: It’s well suited for both urban driving and exploring more scenic inland routes, offering a comfortable ride for all passengers.
medium.BestFor: Families, longer stays, travelers exploring the whole island.

suv.Title: SUV 5-Seater – Adventure & Space
suv.Description: The SUV 5-Seater is ideal for travelers who want a more elevated driving experience and additional interior space. With a stronger road presence and extra comfort, this vehicle is great for island adventures, scenic drives, and travelers carrying more luggage.
suv.Details: It offers stability, comfort, and versatility — perfect for both coastal cruising and exploring Mauritius beyond the main tourist areas.
suv.BestFor: Families, adventure travelers, guests seeking more space and comfort.

7seater.Title: 7-Seater – Family & Group Travel
7seater.Description: Designed for larger families or small groups, our 7-Seater provides generous seating and space for luggage while maintaining comfort and easy drivability.
7seater.Details: This vehicle is ideal for airport transfers, family holidays, group outings, and guests planning multiple excursions together.
7seater.BestFor: Large families, groups, airport transfers, multi-day touring.

scooter.Title: Scooter Hire – 125cc (Urban Explorer Class)
scooter.Description: Discover Mauritius the fun and flexible way with our 125cc Scooter Hire — perfect for coastal cruising, beach hopping, and easy island exploring. Lightweight, fuel-efficient, and simple to handle, this scooter is ideal for navigating local roads, seaside routes, and town areas.
scooter.Details: The 125cc engine provides enough power for comfortable riding while remaining easy to control. Scooters are a fantastic way to avoid traffic, park easily, and enjoy the open-air island experience. Includes helmet(s) and basic safety check.
scooter.BestFor: Couples, solo travelers, short distances, coastal exploring, easy parking.

transfer.Title: Airport Transfer Rates – Mauritius
transfer.Description: We offer private, door-to-door airport transfers from Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam International Airport (MRU) to all major regions of Mauritius. Prices depend on vehicle type and hotel location.

hero.title: About Us — Allez Moris Travel
hero.subtitle: Welcome to Allez Moris Travel — your trusted online tour operator based in beautiful Mauritius.

ourName.p1: Our name says it all: <1>“Allez Moris”</1> means “Let’s go Mauritius” — and “Moris” is the warm local name we use for our island.
ourName.p2: It’s familiar, authentic, and full of heart. That is exactly what we want every traveller to feel from the moment they start planning with us.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.p1: Allez Moris Travel is a modern, Mauritian-owned tour operator created for travellers who want more than a holiday — they want an experience.
whoWeAre.p2: Whether you're visiting for the first time, returning for another escape, or planning a special celebration, we make it easy to explore the best of the island with confidence.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.subtitle: We help you plan and book unforgettable experiences across Mauritius, including:

ourApproach.title: Our Approach
ourApproach.subtitle: At Allez Moris Travel, we believe travel should feel simple, smooth, and personal. That’s why we focus on:
items: Tailor-made options to suit different travel styles
Fast, online convenience with real human support

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Allez Moris Travel
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Because we’re local — and we care.
whyChooseUs.p1: We’re not just selling tours. We’re sharing the place we call home. We take pride in offering travellers safe, well-organised, and authentic services, while making sure every booking feels easy and secure.
whyChooseUs.p2: Whether you’re after adventure, romance, family fun, or pure relaxation — Allez Moris Travel is ready to guide you.

outro.title: Let’s Go — Allez Moris!
outro.subtitle: Let us take care of the planning while you enjoy the island life.
outro.footer: Allez Moris Travel — Mauritius made easy, authentic, and unforgettable.
